audit: V731 Liberty Mobile Certification Blocker Audit
scope: Audit only; no runtime, UI, county status, directional system, Dispatch Board, or onboarding changes.
finalDetermination:
LIBERTY MOBILE CERTIFICATION BLOCKER AUDIT
BLOCKED

blockers.name: Incorrect Road Attribution
blockers.finding: Tap Map coordinate ownership and display road-name ownership can diverge. A TX 146 raw tap can keep TX 146 coordinates while resolver/cached/fallback road metadata supplies US 90/Waco Street wording.
blockers.highestConfidenceRootCause: Split location ownership across raw tap placement, road resolver diagnostics, submission metadata, shared road lookup, display builders, and awareness/alert wording builders.
blockers.impact: Launch blocker because user-facing surfaces can attribute one incident to conflicting roads.

blockers.name: Severe Mobile Interaction Delay
blockers.finding: The click-to-submit path awaits network insert and then performs synchronous local-immediate refresh/render work before returning, including refreshReportHazardViews, renderUnifiedIncidents, and immediate marker auto-render scheduling.
blockers.highestConfidenceRootCause: Synchronous post-submit refresh/render chain on the mobile click handler path, with possible network/fallback insert contribution.
blockers.impact: Launch blocker because normal reporting appears unresponsive.

surfaceDivergence.alerts: Can use corridor/localized summaries and reported-on metadata.
surfaceDivergence.popups: Can render correct marker coordinate with resolver-derived popup text.
surfaceDivergence.routes: Can inherit unified incident wording while route relevance remains spatial.

roadAttributionAudit.v727Contribution: Not primary cause; directional context can make mismatches more visible but does not itself select the base road.
roadAttributionAudit.scopeAssessment: Shared platform bug class; Liberty launch-critical manifestation.

likelySlowStages: Supabase insert or metadata fallback retry
scheduleHazardMarkerAutoRender immediate render plus delayed rerenders

classification.libertySpecific: Launch impact yes; code path shared.
classification.mobileSpecific: Mobile-amplified due to Tap Map, portrait Awareness, and sheet transitions.

smallestRecommendedV732Scope: Create one canonical post-submit display-location contract for all surfaces.
Confidence-gate resolver road names against the raw tap coordinate and accepted candidate distance.
Isolate/invalidate per-tap resolver state so cached road names cannot cross submissions.
Defer and coalesce full refresh/render work until after immediate UI acknowledgment.
Use existing diagnostics before creating new helper systems.
